events.title: We Found You Online: Day 1 - Guest Session & Qualifier Quiz
events.description: Beginner-level OSINT challenges evaluating submission speed and flag accuracy. Play now!

events.title: Research: To Infinity and Beyond - Initial Manuscript Draft
events.description: Submission of anonymized initial manuscript draft for academic peer evaluation.

events.title: Research: Peer Review Window
events.description: Evaluate 2 anonymous peer works submitted by other authors during the draft submission.

events.title: Representation Learning in Biology: Biomolecular Embeddings
events.description: Extracting vector spaces and biological embeddings using ESM and DNABERT models.

events.title: From Syntax to Sentience: Classical NLP to LLMs
events.description: Deep dive from traditional parsing models to decoder-only large language models.

events.title: Last1Standing: Round I - Individual Task Rush
events.description: High-intensity physical and cognitive scavenger hunt round.

events.title: We Found You Online: Day 2 - Station Puzzles
events.description: On-campus physical station hunt using digital OSINT clues starting at 5:00 PM.

events.title: Keynote Research Basics & Hypothesis Design Seminar
events.description: Methodologies for structuring hypothesis validation in quantitative studies.

events.title: Compassion-A-Thon 3.0: Grand Finale POD Workshop
events.description: Masterclass with Prof. Bala Ramadurai on transforming raw validation into scalable MVPs.

events.title: Compassion-A-Thon 3.0: Office Hours & On-Campus Interviews
events.description: One-on-one team mentoring sessions and user research interviews across the campus complex.

events.title: Optimisation in Machine Learning
events.description: Gradient descent variations, convergence bounds, and optimizer heuristics by Prof. Harish Guruprasad.

events.title: From Chatbots to Autonomous Agents
events.description: Building self-correcting agent chains and multi-agent systems with Shabareesh Raj.

events.title: The Burn Club: Guided High-Energy Zumba Session
events.description: Guided recreational choreography workshop run by Pravaha × Sportify.

events.title: AI-Powered Precision Health at Scale
events.description: Applying computational methods to electronic health records and genomic sequencing datasets with Dr. Naveen Sivadasan.

events.title: Context is the New Compute: Engineering Retrieval Systems
events.description: Vector database indexing strategies, chunking optimization, and hybrid search pipelines.

events.title: Compassion-A-Thon 3.0: Final Stage Pitch Evaluations
events.description: Final stage pitches and validation feedback from VC panel.

events.title: Playing with AI - Autonomous Agentic Systems 101
events.description: Hands-on lab for building and running local execution agents.

events.title: Sports Analytics & AI Workshop
events.description: Data collection methods in sports and predictive modeling of player workload with Dr. Babji Srinivasan.

events.title: Paradox Got Talent Showcase & Mr. & Mrs. Paradox Prelims
events.description: Talent showcases and initial modeling rounds at the main Open Air Theatre stage.

events.title: Beyond Next-Token Prediction in Multimodal AI Models
events.description: Exploring system-2 reasoning in LLMs, diffusion policies, and multimodal grounding.

events.title: Five Mistakes Data Scientists Make & How Economics Fixes Them
events.description: Identifying confounding variables, selection bias, and economic counterfactuals.

events.title: Data Science with Coding Agents: Masterclass on SLMs
events.description: Leveraging smaller language models for specialized code generation and data parsing tasks.

events.title: Why Most AI Systems Fail and How to Build Ones That Don't
events.description: Analyzing distribution shifts, data leakage, and designing robust monitoring pipelines.

events.title: Paradox Closing Ceremony & Celebratory Grand DJ Concert Night
events.description: Closing remarks, prize distribution, followed by the headline high-energy DJ performance.
